segments.intro: Welcome. This is pdk — the Portaldot Dev Kit. First place winner at the Portaldot Builder Tools hackathon. Let me show you what it does.
segments.demo: When a transaction fails on Portaldot, the chain returns a raw error code with no name and no fix. pdk decodes those codes. Install it from PyPI in one line.   First — pdk doctor. It checks if your local node is healthy, what runtime version is running, and which features are available.   Next — pdk accounts. Portaldot ships with pre-funded development accounts: Alice, Bob, Charlie. Each holds fifty thousand POT — POT is the native token, like ETH on Ethereum, used to pay gas.   pdk pallets lists every module on the chain. Pallets are how Portaldot organizes features. pdk storage reads any value off-chain, and pdk keys inspects Portaldot addresses in SS58 format.   pdk simulate predicts a transaction's cost before sending. pdk send fires a real on-chain transfer — one POT from Alice to Bob, gas paid in POT, no mocks. And pdk seed funds extra dev accounts from a fixture file.   Now the hero feature. pdk debug submits a real failing transaction and decodes it. The verified panel on the left names the error and shows you how to fix it. The yellow panel on the right is an optional AI suggestion, clearly labelled unverified.   pdk explain is even more powerful. It takes a raw module-and-error code, exactly what the node prints when it rejects something, and resolves it to a named error. Nothing else in the Portaldot ecosystem does this. Two hundred two error indices, all verified against the live runtime.   And pdk debug with the fix flag does both — diagnose the failure, then automatically submit the corrected transaction.   pdk report scans recent blocks and groups every failure by type — triage at a glance. pdk watch streams chain events live; filter by pallet to focus on what matters. And pdk ai-setup is a wizard for the optional AI layer.
segments.outro: Fourteen commands. Real POT gas. Zero mocks. pdk is on PyPI today — pip install portaldot-pdk. The standard Portaldot dev toolkit. Vote pdk.
